chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH Court OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No. S- 734 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge 18.03.2019 Mr. Ubedullah Ghoto, Advocate for applicant/surety Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG ********************* Accused/applicants Rab Nawaz, Hazoor Bux and Qabool Ahmed were admitted to interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 24.11.2017. Subsequently, such order was recalled by this Court vide order dated 27.07.2018 by making an observation that they have misused the concession of interim pre-arrest bail and then their surety /applicant was directed to furnish his reply to notice under Section 514 Cr.P.C. which he furnished by inter alia stating therein that he executed the bail bond for the above said accused for no monetary benefits. It is contended by the learned counsel for the applicant/surety that the applicant/surety has executed bail bond on behalf of the said accused on humanitarian ground and for no monetary gain. By contending so, he sought for taking lenient action against the applicant/surety. It is contended by learned DPG for the State that the said accused are still absconding, as such, according to him, no case for lenient action against the applicant/surety is made out. I have considered the arguments and perused the record. There is no denial to the fact that the interim pre-arrest bail which was granted to said accused was recalled by this Court when it was found to have been misused by them. They are still absconding, nothing has been brought on record by the applicant /surety which may indicate that he executed bail bond on behalf of the said accused on humanitarian ground and without any monetary gain.

There is no denial to the fact that the interim pre-arrest bail which was granted to said accused was recalled by this Court when it was found to have been misused by them. They are still absconding, nothing has been brought on record by the applicant /surety which may indicate that he executed bail bond on behalf of the said accused on humanitarian ground and without any monetary gain. No case for taking lenient action is made out, consequently office is directed to encash the surety bonds and then to deposit the same with Government treasury under relevant head of account. Order accordingly. Judge ARBROHI
